title: Linear arrangement of wait statements results in timeout
body:
When working on a branch, I made a test where I chained 4 `initial` blocks so that all but the first one await for its predecessor and then print some message. The verilated design timeouts and doesn't produce correct output both on my and the master branch.

Interestingly, if the chain is reduced to 3 blocks, the simulation works.

Here is the test: [t_process_await.zip](https://github.com/verilator/verilator/files/11463507/t_process_await.zip).

Tested on the current master; on Fedora, Linux 6.1.14
